Refer to figure or Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 1" 
An aircraft is flying from ABERDEEN (ADN, N57°19', W0002°16 ') to SUMBURGH (N59°53′, W001°18′). Given the following data, the estimated remaining fuel when passing waypoint GAVEL is:
